TextENGNew: The car had stopped.
But he didn't know any more than that.
He was not only blindfolded, but locked inside the car's trunk.
He never would have known, until experiencing it firsthand, just how helpless a person becomes when robbed of sight.
He quickly realized it was futile to try to free himself. The suffocating confines of the trunk soon made him lightheaded,@kand he had no choice but to let the slow torture cloud his consciousness.
So when the car stopped, the engine was cut, and that miserable vibration ceased,@khe couldn't help feeling a sense of liberation -- even though nothing had actually changed.
Of course, he was soon removed from that delusion.
He strained his ears when he heard one of the men who had abducted him and an older man he was hearing for the first time strike up a conversation...
``...Nice to see you. The chick is in the trunk.@k@vS20/00/yamaA44002. He struggled so much that he's probably exhausted right now, but there's not a mark on him, just as ordered.``
``...Ohh, musta been a handful.``
The trunk opened, letting in a blast of fresh, cool air.
Just moments ago, he had wished desperately to escape this stifling trunk, yet now that it was actually opened, he was seized by a sudden dread.
...So much so that he wished the lid he had hated so fiercely would close once more, sealing him off from these men.
Suddenly, somebody stroked his head.

With the blindfold still on, he couldn't tell whether the hand touching his head was caressing him or sizing up his scalp for removal.@kUnable to distinguish between the two, he could only freeze as the worst possibilities raced through his mind...
"...Poor li'l fellow... He's shakin'...@k@vS20/14/443400003.Jus' sit tight for a spell..."
The older man said that kindly as he gently stroked the boy's head.
"Mus' be real hard on ya... But see, yer grandpa's a kind man.@k@vS20/14/443400005.He'll come to yer rescue soon enough..."
Having grown up hearing nothing but standard Japanese, the boy found the older man's distinctive dialect deeply memorable.
But he had no idea what he was saying.
It took several repetitions in his head before he realized that "yer grandpa" meant his own grandfather...
Eventually, the hand that was stroking his head loosened the blindfold.
``...Can't keep his eyes covered... if he splits his face open it'd be bad.``
``Mm... is tha' so. Well, at least let's take off tha gag.@k@vS20/14/443400007. 'E can't even breathe like this...``
``...It'll be trouble if he yells... Leave him to us...``
"Geez, ya guys got no sense at all!! ...The main family said to treat 'im decent.@k@vS20/14/443400009.Ya better not forget that..."
``Yeah. We won't do anything stupid.@k@vS20/00/yamaA44006. ...As long as the kid cooperates, that is.``
The man's hand prodded roughly and repeatedly at the boy's head.
A rough, calloused hand -- nothing like the gentle one that had been stroking his head.
Just stay cooperative.

Stay cooperative, and everything will be fine.@kBut cause trouble, and there's no telling what might happen.@kThat well-worn threat was slowly, steadily beaten into his skull with every tap of that hand.
changeReason: New translation adds the first part "Stay cooperative, and everything will be fine" which was missing from the original (JPN: 大人しくしていれば良し), and "slowly, steadily" better captures JPN じわりじわり (gradually).
